nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (Hourly)
nodes.notes: Runs every hour to check for booking activity

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_sessions FROM whatsapp_sessions WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'

nodes.name: Count Recent Sessions
nodes.notes: Get number of active sessions in last hour

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as pending_bookings FROM whatsapp_sessions WHERE context->>'action' = 'pending_booking' AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'

nodes.name: Count Pending Bookings
nodes.notes: Get count of pending booking requests
